title: From Another Dimension:insects
description: Insects from another dimension have invaded this world, but do they seem to have no harm at all?
body:
Feature：

①：Lovely mobs

②：Parasites like

**Backstory**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
An evil creature form another dimension--the InsectQueen.

  
The Insect Queen set her sights on this world, divided her body, and secretly descended through the time and space.


She uses her clone to absorb the vitality of the surrounding blocks and incubate her children through it.


Her power is so strong，even the bedrock can also absorb vitality from it.


When her children reach a certain level of development, the true form of the Insect Queen will descend, and this world will transform into her new territory.


来自域外的邪魔，虫母盯上了这块大陆，分化自己的身躯，偷偷的穿过空间裂缝，降临于此。
她利用自己的分身，吸取周遭方块的生命力，并借由此来孵化自己的后代。
她的力量之强，即使是基岩也能被她吸取生命力。
当她的后代发展到一定的程度，虫母的本体将会降临，这方世界便化为了她的新的疆土。

</details>

You’re free to drop this into any modpack—no need to ask or get permission—and recording videos is more than welcome.

可以自由随意的加入到整合包中，无须询问或申请，录制视频也非常的欢迎。


![Insect Queen Complete](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9ee7757581047ccf383620d5e1945f3611fa78b.png)
![Insect Queen Complete](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0714e5e9f66713247763323284ece6e997b7077e.png)
**_English version intro_**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**The world will generate 1 Insect Queen with an extremely low probability
Right click the Clock in the main hand to view the current Evolution of Insects

If the Insect Queen survives for a period of time, it will die and generate a Worm Column underground
(If the Insect Queen dies for other reasons, it will devour the "vitality" of the block below, generating a "Deadblock" containing a new Insect Queen. If the Insect Queen kills other creatures, it will generate a Worm Column in place.)
(The "Worm Column" and "Deadblock containing a new Insect Queen" are destroyed, causing an explosion and generating one new Insect Queen)

The Worm Column will gradually absorb the "vitality" of the surrounding blocks to expand, and the surrounding blocks will become a "Deadblock"
(If the "Deadblock" generated due to this situation is destroyed, nothing will happen. This is the first and simplest opportunity to clear the infection.)

If there is no block on the top of the Deadblock and the bottom is a non air block, after a period of time, there is a probability that one "Insect Baby" will drill out of the "Deadblock"

After hatching, this block will disappear
# 
"Insect Baby" is the beginning of evolution. When "Insect Baby" kills 100 mobs, the Evolution of Insects will reach level 1

If the Evolution of Insects is lower than level 1, "Insect Baby" will increase the Evolution of Insects by 1% after death

After level 1, "Insect Baby" cannot improve Evolution of Insects no matter how many mobs it kills

But, "Insect Baby" will evolve into "Insect Warrior" after killing mobs
# 
When the "Insect Warrior" kills an additional 400 mobs on top of the previous one, the Evolution of Insects will reach level 2

After level 2, "Insect Warrior" cannot improve Evolution of Insects no matter how many mobs it kills

However, "Insect Warrior" will evolve into "Insect Sky Swimmer" after killing mobs

If the Evolution of Insects is level 3, "Insect Warrior" will evolve into "Insect Sky Swimmer" and split into a new "Insect Warrior" after killing mobs
# 
When "Insect Sky Swimmer" kills 500 more mobs on top of the previous one, Evolution of Insects will move to level 3

After level 3, "Insect Sky Swimmer" cannot improve Evolution of Insects no matter how many mobs it kills

However, "Insect Sky Swimmer" will evolve into "Insect Sky Pricker" after killing mobs

If Evolution of Insects is level 4, the "Insect Sky Swimmer" will spawn one "Insect Sky Swimmer" after killing mobs
# 
When the "Insect Sky Pricker" kills 2000 more mobs on top of the previous one, the Evolution of Insects will reach level 4

After level 4, "Insect Sky Pricker" cannot improve Evolution of Insects no matter how many mobs it kills

However, "Insect Sky Pricker" will evolve into "Insect Queen Complete" (only evolving once) after killing a mob

Only able to evolve once, which means there is only one "Insect Queen Complete" in the world

But when the queen died,new queen will born

After one evolution, the "Insect Sky Pricker" will produce one "Insect Sky Swimmer" after killing mobs

If Evolution of Insects is level 5, the "Insect Sky Pricker" will spawn 1 "Insect Sky Pricker" and 1 "Insect Sky Swimmer" after killing mobs
# 
After reaching level 4, only when "Insect Queen Complete" kills a mob will  increase the Evolution of Insects

When, based on the previous level, killing 10,000 mobs, Evolution of Insects will reach level 5

After continuing to kill at least 100,000 mobs, the Evolution of Insects will reach level 6, which is the maximum level

In the case of Evolution of insects 6, if the Insect Queen dies, it will be transformed back into a Worm Column underground

And at this stage, there is basically nothing that can kill Insects anymore

The world will be destroyed
#
- "Insect Queen" has a certain degree of damage adaptation resistance from the beginning, only attacking non aggressive or weakly aggressive mobs
- "Insect Baby" is very small and fast, only able to attack non aggressive or weakly aggressive mobs
- "Insect Warrior" is a truly combat capable Insect that is strong and powerful, attacking almost all mobs
- "Insect Sky Swimmer", air superiority! Being able to swim in the air, yeah, "swim", attacks almost all mobs.
- "Insect Sky Pricker" has strengthened its health and defense on the basis of the previous one, breaking through the sky with a drill bit! Often fly at very high altitudes, sniping almost all mobs passing by
- "Insect Queen Complete",The Toughest! The Invincible! The Unbeatable! Crush! Destroy! Exterminate! The complete form of the Insect Queen!The ontological descent after fully adapting to world rules!
# 
> Evolution of insects：
> 
> Level 0: harmless
> 
> Level 1: Low harm
> 
> Level 2: Medium harm
> 
> Level 3: High harm
> 
> Level 4: Extremely dangerous
> 
> Level 5: Endangered
> 
> Level 6: There is no solution**


</details>



**_中文版介绍（Chinese version intro）_**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

世界会以极低的概率生成1只虫母
主手拿钟右键可以查看当前演化阶段

虫母存活一段时间，就会死掉，并在地下生成虫柱
（如果虫母因为其它原因死亡，会吞噬下方方块的“生命力”，生成蕴含了新虫母的“失活的方块”，如果虫母杀死了其它生物，会在原地生成虫柱）
（“虫柱”和“蕴含了新虫母的失活的方块”被破坏，会产生爆炸并生成1只新虫母）

虫柱会慢慢吸收周围方块的“生命力”，来进行扩张，周围的土地会变成“失活的方块”
（因为这种情况而生成的“失活的方块”被破坏的话，无事发生，这是清除感染的第一次，也是最简单的一次机会）

失活的方块如果在上方1格无方块阻挡，下方1格是非空气方块的情况下，经过一段时间后，会有概率从“失活的方块”中钻出1只“虫之子”

孵化过后，这个方块会消失
# 
“虫之子”是进化的开始，当“虫之子”杀死100只生物后，演化阶段将来到1级

如果演化阶段低于1级，“虫之子”死亡后，会提升1%演化阶段

1级过后，“虫之子”无论杀多少生物也无法提升演化等级

但是，“虫之子”会在杀死生物后，进化成“虫族战士”
# 
当“虫族战士”在之前的基础上，再杀死400只生物后，演化阶段将来到2级

2级过后，“虫族战士”无论杀多少生物也无法提升演化等级

但是，“虫族战士”会在杀死生物后，进化成“虫族魊空者”

若演化等级为3级，“虫族战士”会在杀死生物后，进化成“虫族魊空者”并分裂出新的“虫族战士”
# 
当“虫族魊空者”在之前的基础上，再杀死500只生物后，演化阶段将来到3级

3级过后，“虫族魊空者”无论杀多少生物也无法提升演化等级

但是，“虫族魊空者”会在杀死生物后，进化成“虫族魊空突击者”

若演化等级为4级，“虫族魊空者”会在杀死生物后，生出1只“虫族魊空者”
# 
当“虫族魊空突击者”在之前的基础上，再杀死2000只生物后，演化阶段将来到4级

4级过后，“虫族魊空突击者”无论杀多少生物也无法提升演化等级

但是，“虫族魊空突击者”会在杀死生物后，进化成“虫母·完全体”（只会进化1次）

只会进化1次，也就是说，世界上只有1只“虫母·完全体”（如果没什么意外情况的话）

当进化过1次之后，“虫族魊空突击者”会在杀死生物后，生出1只“虫族魊空者”

若演化等级为5级，“虫族魊空突击者”会在杀死生物后，生出1“虫族魊空突击者”和1只“虫族魊空者”
# 
“虫母·完全体”杀死1只生物增长的演化等级，相当于其它虫族杀死10只生物增长的演化等级，且无上限

演化等级来到4级过后，只有“虫母·完全体”杀死生物，才会增加演化等级

当在之前的基础上，杀满10000（虫母换算下来只要杀1000只生物）只生物后，演化等级将来到5级

当继续杀满100000（虫母换算下来只要杀10000只生物）只生物后，演化等级将来到6级，也就是最大等级

演化等级6级的情况下，如果虫母死亡，会在地下重新变成虫柱

并且到了这个阶段，基本上不存在能杀死虫族的东西了

世界就此毁灭，开新档吧
（有抢救的方法，就是在演化等级到6级之前，杀光所有的虫族）
# 
- “虫母”，在最开始就有一定的伤害适应抗性，只会攻击无攻击性，或攻击性很弱的生物
- “虫之子”，很小，很快，只会攻击无攻击性，或攻击性很弱的生物
- “虫族战士”，真正有战斗力的虫族，强而有力，攻击除虫族外的几乎所有生物
- “虫族魊空者”，制空权！能在空中遨游，真正意义上的“遨游”，攻击除虫族外的几乎所有生物，还敢攻击凋灵和末影龙了
- “虫族魊空突击者”，在之前的基础上进行了生命值和防御的强化，突破天际的钻头！经常会飞在非常高的高空，狙击路过的除虫族外的几乎所有生物，还敢攻击凋灵和末影龙了
- “虫母·完全体”，强劲！无敌！最强！粉碎！玉碎！大喝彩！虫母的完全形态！完全适应世界规则后的本体降临！攻击除虫族外的几乎所有生物！但是由于体型很大，所以会有误伤（
# 
> 演化等级：
> 
> 0级：无危
> 
> 1级：低危
> 
> 2级：中危
> 
> 3级：高危
> 
> 4级：极危
> 
> 5级：濒危
> 
> 6级：无解

</details>
